# MSBuild Project File Review: ContosoApp

## 📋 Repository Overview

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| Projects | 5 SDK-style (.csproj) |
| Solution | ContosoApp.sln |
| Directory.Build.props | ❌ Missing |
| Directory.Build.targets | ❌ Missing |
| Directory.Packages.props | ❌ Missing |
| Target Framework | net8.0 (all projects) |

---

## 🔴 Errors (Likely to Cause Issues)

### 1. Package Version Mismatch — `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions`

| Project | Version |
|---------|---------|
| ContosoApp.Core | 8.0.0 |
| ContosoApp.Api | 8.0.0 |
| ContosoApp.Services | **8.0.1** |

This creates a **diamond dependency risk**. When `ContosoApp.Api` references both `ContosoApp.Core` (transitive 8.0.0) and `ContosoApp.Services` (transitive 8.0.1), NuGet will unify to 8.0.1, but the mismatch signals a maintenance problem and can trigger **NU1605 (package downgrade)** warnings in certain topologies.

**Fix:** Centralize with `Directory.Packages.props` (see Suggestion #1 below).

---

### 2. Test Package Version Drift Between Test Projects

| Package | Core.Tests | Api.Tests |
|---------|-----------|-----------|
| Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk | 17.10.0 | **17.9.0** |
| xunit | 2.8.1 | **2.7.1** |
| xunit.runner.visualstudio | 2.8.1 | **2.5.6** |

Using different test infrastructure versions across test projects can lead to inconsistent test behavior and makes updates error-prone.

**Fix:** Centralize with `Directory.Packages.props`.

---

## 🟡 Warnings (Anti-patterns / Should Fix)

### 3. Massive Property Duplication Across All 5 Projects

The following **8 properties** are copy-pasted identically in every single project:

```xml
<TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
<LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
<Nullable>enable</Nullable>
<ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
<TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
<EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
<Company>Contoso</Company>
<Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
```

That's **40 lines of duplicated XML** across 5 files. This violates DRY and makes changing any policy (e.g., upgrading to net9.0) require touching all files.

**Fix:** Create a `Directory.Build.props` at the repo root.

### 4. Duplicated `DocumentationFile` Property in Source Projects

All 3 source projects (Core, Api, Services) repeat:
```xml
<DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
```

This belongs in a shared `Directory.Build.props` with a condition to exclude test projects.

### 5. Duplicated `PrintBuildInfo` Target in Source Projects

All 3 source projects contain an identical custom target:
```xml
<Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build">
  <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
</Target>
```

This should live once in a `Directory.Build.targets` file.

### 6. Custom Target Missing `Inputs`/`Outputs`

The `PrintBuildInfo` target has no `Inputs`/`Outputs` attributes. While this is acceptable for diagnostic message-only targets (you probably *do* want it to run every time), it's worth documenting the intent explicitly. If the target ever does real work, this will break incremental builds.

### 7. Unnecessary Split `PropertyGroup` in Source Projects

Core, Api, and Services each have a second `<PropertyGroup>` solely for `DocumentationFile`. These should be merged into the main `<PropertyGroup>` for readability:

```xml
<!-- BAD: Two PropertyGroups with no conditional reason to separate -->
<PropertyGroup>
  <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  ...
</PropertyGroup>
<PropertyGroup>
  <DocumentationFile>...</DocumentationFile>
</PropertyGroup>

<!-- GOOD: Single PropertyGroup -->
<PropertyGroup>
  <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  ...
  <DocumentationFile>...</DocumentationFile>
</PropertyGroup>
```

---

## 🔵 Suggestions (Improvements)

### 1. Introduce Central Package Management (CPM)

Create a `Directory.Packages.props` at the repo root to centralize all package versions:

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Shared -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" Version="6.5.0" />
    <!-- Test -->
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.10.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="2.8.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

Then remove `Version="..."` from all `<PackageReference>` items in .csproj files.

### 2. Create `Directory.Build.props` at Repo Root

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
    <Company>Contoso</Company>
    <Authors>Contoso Engineering</Authors>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Source projects generate XML docs -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <DocumentationFile>$(OutputPath)$(AssemblyName).xml</DocumentationFile>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Test projects are not packable -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

### 3. Create `Directory.Build.targets` at Repo Root

```xml
<Project>
  <!-- Diagnostic target for source projects only -->
  <Target Name="PrintBuildInfo" BeforeTargets="Build"
          Condition="!$(MSBuildProjectName.EndsWith('.Tests'))">
    <Message Importance="high" Text="Building $(AssemblyName) [$(Configuration)]" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

### 4. Resulting Minimal Project Files

After applying suggestions 1–3, your projects become:

**ContosoApp.Core.csproj** (~4 lines):
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**ContosoApp.Api.csproj** (~10 lines):
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions" />
    <PackageReference Include="Swashbuckle.AspNetCore" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\ContosoApp.Core\ContosoApp.Core.csproj" />
    <ProjectReference Include="..\ContosoApp.Services\ContosoApp.Services.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

**ContosoApp.Core.Tests.csproj** (~10 lines):
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" />
    <PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" />
    <PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <ProjectReference Include="..\..\src\ContosoApp.Core\ContosoApp.Core.csproj" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

---

## 🟢 Positive (Good Practices Already in Place)

| Practice | Notes |
|----------|-------|
| ✅ SDK-style projects | All projects are modern SDK-style — no legacy migration needed |
| ✅ `TreatWarningsAsErrors` | Enforced consistently across all projects |
| ✅ `Nullable` enabled | Good null-safety discipline |
| ✅ `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild` | Code style enforcement at build time |
| ✅ `IsPackable=false` on test projects | Correctly prevents test projects from producing NuGet packages |
| ✅ Clean project references | Proper dependency graph without circular references |
| ✅ Consistent target framework | All projects target net8.0 |

---

## 📊 Summary Table

| Severity | Count | Key Theme |
|----------|-------|-----------|
| 🔴 Error | 2 | Package version mismatches |
| 🟡 Warning | 5 | Duplication / anti-patterns |
| 🔵 Suggestion | 4 | Centralization opportunities |
| 🟢 Positive | 7 | Already using modern SDK-style |

---

## 🎯 Recommended Action Priority

1. **Create `Directory.Build.props`** — Eliminates 40+ duplicated property lines immediately
2. **Create `Directory.Packages.props`** — Fixes version mismatches and prevents future drift
3. **Create `Directory.Build.targets`** — Eliminates duplicated `PrintBuildInfo` target
4. **Slim down .csproj files** — Remove centralized properties, remove `Version=` from PackageReferences

This would reduce total .csproj XML from ~155 lines to ~45 lines, while fixing version consistency bugs and making future maintenance (e.g., upgrading to net9.0) a single-line change.

**Fix:** Centralize with `Directory.Packages.props` (see Suggestion #1 below).

| xunit | 2.8.1 | **2.7.1** |
| xunit.runner.visualstudio | 2.8.1 | **2.5.6** |

**Fix:** Centralize with `Directory.Packages.props`.
